prompt: Create a consistent hero keyframe for a premium fitness introduction reel. Wardrobe: use clean neutral athletic clothing; avoid visible third-party logos. Scene: minimal premium training studio. Camera: eye-level medium portrait, natural 50mm perspective. Lighting: soft directional key light with controlled warm rim light. Visual style: ultra-realistic. Composition: 9:16, 4 variation(s), PNG output. Preserve natural anatomy, realistic texture, coherent lighting and exact character identity.
